description: Reverb is an online marketplace for buying and selling music gear. It also provides seller tools and integrations for managing listings, orders, payments, and shop settings.
summary: Reverb exposes one documented HTTP REST API for marketplace/shop integrations at `https://api.reverb.com/api`, authenticated with a Reverb personal access token; docs also describe a matching sandbox host at `https://sandbox.reverb.com/api` for testing.
